title: anthemis secundiramea subsp. lopadusana
intro: Anthemis secundiramea subsp. lopadusana, also known as a sub-species of the Anthemis secundiramea, is a plant species within the daisy family. It is a plant commonly known as 'Lopadusawort' and is found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Anthemis secundiramea subsp. lopadusana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of the plant include the relief of digestive issues and the treatment of fever, which can be achieved through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
